title: brachychiton paradoxus var. luridus
intro: Brachychiton paradoxus var. luridus, commonly known as the Green Blood Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, and traditional uses include treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Brachychiton paradoxus var. luridus include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic actions such as antioxidant and antiseptic properties.

side_effects: Brachychiton paradoxus var. luridus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, nausea, and vomiting due to its high saponin content.
